global_numeric_tests.question: Transaction value differs by category
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: Differences may be statistically detectable because the sample is large, but the overall practical separation is negligible.

global_numeric_tests.question: Transaction value differs by location
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: Differences may be statistically detectable because the sample is large, but the overall practical separation is negligible.

global_numeric_tests.question: Transaction value differs by payment method
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: Differences may be statistically detectable because the sample is large, but the overall practical separation is negligible.

global_numeric_tests.question: Transaction value differs by recorded discount status
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: Differences may be statistically detectable because the sample is large, but the overall practical separation is negligible.

global_numeric_tests.question: Known discount groups: transaction value Yes vs No
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: Interpret with effect size and confidence interval, not p-value alone.

global_numeric_tests.question: Unit price is associated with quantity purchased
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: The relationship is weak if |rho| is small; pricing decisions require controlled experiments and demand context.

global_numeric_tests.question: Monthly recorded revenue shows a monotonic time trend
global_numeric_tests.practical_interpretation: A weak trend means month-to-month variation dominates; do not forecast from this association alone.

categorical_tests.question: Payment-method mix differs by location
categorical_tests.interpretation: Association only; availability and channel design may confound the pattern.

categorical_tests.question: Product-category mix differs by location
categorical_tests.interpretation: Association only; availability and channel design may confound the pattern.

categorical_tests.question: Missing Total Spent is associated with Category
categorical_tests.interpretation: A significant p-value with tiny V is not practically important.

categorical_tests.question: Missing Total Spent is associated with Location
categorical_tests.interpretation: A significant p-value with tiny V is not practically important.

categorical_tests.question: Missing Total Spent is associated with Payment Method
categorical_tests.interpretation: A significant p-value with tiny V is not practically important.

cautions: P-values are interpreted alongside effect sizes and confidence intervals.
Large sample size can make trivial differences statistically significant.
Discount comparisons are descriptive because 33.4% are Unknown.
No observational result is interpreted as causal.
